title: Counterfactual Game
genericDescription: Explore alternative possibilities; model causal changes; prevent counterfactuals from becoming arbitrary fantasy.
specificDescription: Build a game that asks "what if" about a historical event, aesthetic convention, social ritual, or AI-mediated future. At least three variables must alter the outcome space.
gradingRubric: 30 pts counterfactual model; 20 pts causal clarity; 20 pts track-specific insight; 15 pts player-facing explanation; 15 pts notes.
